title: rivina humilis
intro: Rivina humilis, also known as the Rum Plant or Rediviva, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phytolaccaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Rivina humilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
